Plaintiff Atlantic Credit & Finance Inc.'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Atlantic Credit & Finance Inc.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off-calendar. Per the sheriff's department, this claim of exemption now applies to a defunct levy. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
